generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO cyber defense strategist, let me tell you why strategic autonomy isn't just about security - it's about preserving our way of life. When you see how quickly allies can be pressured to compromise civil liberties during crises, you realize local control matters. The 2025 Baltic exercise showed even our closest partners can't always be counted on. We need domestic resilience to handle threats while keeping our freedoms intact. #NationalSecurityFirst
